data.description:
## Why
The gate serves a broad, diverse client base; it must be honestly documented.

## What
- How the gate works (three-pass), the config surface (risk posture, chunking, budget caps, per-criterion
  blocking, the global enable/disable kill-switch), fail-open behavior, the certification semantics, and the
  CI-check pattern. Cross-reference the workflow-engine usage doc (6f2d WS-DOC).

## Scope
- Docs only; the canonical workflow-engine intended-use doc lives in 6f2d.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Docs cover behavior, config (incl. the disable kill-switch), fail-open, cert semantics, CI pattern.
- [ ] Cross-references the workflow-engine usage doc.
- [ ] States end-to-end time-to-first-work honestly (not just the 50ms claim check).
data.title: Docs: gate behavior, config surface, fail-open, cert semantics, CI pattern
